name: Ensure at least two Okta admins are configured
body:
### Security intent

This control validates that **at least two Okta admins are configured** across Okta.

### Access condition reviewed

The assessment focuses on at least two Okta admins are configured. It reviews the identity, credential, role, or policy state that creates the access condition described by the control.

### Practitioner note

Identity findings deserve careful cleanup rather than blind deletion. Confirm ownership and business need, remove unnecessary standing access, and prefer federation, groups, roles, MFA, and short-lived credentials over direct long-lived grants.
description: At least two Okta admins are configured
remediationDescription:
### Okta

1. Open the Okta Admin Console and go to Security > Administrators.
2. Select Add administrator.
3. Assign a second named administrator or approved break-glass account with the minimum admin role required for tenant recovery.
4. Require strong MFA for every administrator account.
5. Avoid sharing one admin account between operators; use named accounts for accountability.
6. Confirm at least two active administrator accounts exist and that both can complete MFA successfully.

Reference: https://help.okta.com/oie/en-us/content/topics/security/administrators-admin-comparison.htm
